name: @magus/textsearch
description: Shared, DOM-free full-text search engine consumed by both the docs site and the console PWA. Holds the Datadog-style query grammar (lexer + parser + ranker), a generic entry type, and the createTextSearch factory (src/textsearch.ts) that would otherwise be duplicated across the two independent esbuild projects. Depends on NEITHER app: callers inject their own records and index source. Has NO runtime npm dependencies, so each consumer bundles it straight from source via a relative import across project dirs (there is NO pnpm workspace). devDeps are the type-check and lint gates only. pnpm (pinned in mise.toml), NOT npm; .npmrc's minimum-release-age is the supply-chain guard.
